description: In-silico protease digestion of protein sequences (FASTA or a single sequence) with a configurable enzyme, producing theoretical peptides with monoisotopic masses and m/z for chosen charge states. Useful for targeted method design and search-space estimation.
rules: provide FASTA and/or SEQUENCE (at least one)
tunable via ENZYME, MISSED, MIN_LENGTH, MAX_LENGTH, CHARGES
usage: Set FASTA (path) and/or SEQUENCE. Optional ENZYME, MISSED, MIN_LENGTH, MAX_LENGTH, CHARGES (space-separated). Output: peptides.csv.
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; if absent the porter still creates peptides.csv and records the reason.
